textMode.jobUrlHelp: [ja] The URL will be saved with the job for reference
textMode.jobContentPlaceholder:
[ja] Paste the full job posting here...

Example:
Senior Software Engineer
Acme Corp - San Francisco, CA (Remote)

About the role:
We're looking for an experienced software engineer...

Requirements:
- 5+ years of experience
- Python, TypeScript
...
textMode.jobContentHelp: [ja] Paste the entire job description. We'll extract the title, company, requirements, and keywords.

urlMode.jobUrlHelp: [ja] We'll fetch the job posting and extract the details automatically.
urlMode.fetchingNote: [ja] Note: Some sites may block automated fetching. If the import fails, try pasting the job content directly.
